name: living-docs
description: Self-maintaining, agent-agnostic project memory. SessionStart surfaces where you left off (today's session log → last session → index). Stop deterministically refreshes (a) an inventory of uncommitted files and (b) a dated session-narrative skeleton with git-derived facts. Optional `consolidate.sh` (opt-in, NOT auto-invoked) fills the LLM-NARRATIVE block from today's git context using your existing Claude Code CLI / Anthropic key / OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Writes into `.agent-memory/` (sessions/decisions/inventory) so the same memory is readable by Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, Codex, Gemini CLI, and humans. Backward-compatible with v0.2.0 project-root notes files.
